summary: Good soundboard capture of the long‑awaited second set featuring shredding Jerry solos on Cold Rain & Snow and Samson & Delilah.
review: The partial second‑set recording finally completes the missing tracks, delivering a clear soundboard source that lets listeners hear Jerry Garcia’s soaring solos. Reviewers highlight the standout performances of “Cold Rain & Snow” and “Samson & Delilah,” and no technical flaws are reported.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive review (4 stars) praises both the performance and the soundboard quality; limited data leads to a cautious rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear soundboard recording, no reported flaws or dropouts.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Partial second set now complete, providing a satisfying continuation of the concert flow.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s solos are described as shredding and outstanding.
